title: cernohorskya kotschyana
intro: Cernohorskya kotschyana, also known as Kotschy's cernohorskya or Cernohorskya, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the Balkan Peninsula and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cernohorskya kotschyana include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Cernohorskya kotschyana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
